# Vendored browser libraries

These files keep the game runnable offline with no build or install step.

- `react.production.min.js`, `react-dom.production.min.js`, `htm.js`: existing
  React/htm browser builds.
- `pixi.min.mjs`: PixiJS 8.18.1 production ES module, downloaded from
  `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pixi.js@8.18.1/dist/pixi.min.mjs`.
- `pixi.LICENSE.txt`: PixiJS MIT license, downloaded from
  `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/pixi.js@8.18.1/LICENSE`.

PixiJS module SHA-256:
`C1FB83A64B083F296008AB397EB429CD52E9FB2969F11812514A9AAF4642B732`.
